steps.title: Supply the main verb
steps.content: The subject is the singular noun phrase Raymond Chang's textbook General Chemistry: The Essential Concepts. The blank must provide a finite main verb so the sentence is complete.

steps.title: Use singular present agreement
steps.content: A, C, and D are nonfinite verb forms, so each would leave the sentence as a fragment. The simple present singular verb agrees with the textbook and completes the thought. The answer is B.
